metadata.raw_text: {"scores": {"clarity": 5, "simplicity": 5, "brevity_economy": 5, "structure_flow": 5, "specificity_precision": 5, "humanity_voice": 5, "overall": 5}, "rationale": "This is an exemplary internal memo. Clarity: every element of the policy is immediately understandable with no ambiguity. Simplicity: language is plain and direct throughout—no jargon inflation or corporate bloat. Brevity: nothing is wasted; every paragraph earns its place, and there's no throat-clearing intro. Structure: the bold headers and logical progression (what → why → what next) make it scannable and easy to act on. Specificity: concrete numbers (22%, 89%, 30% of office space, six Zoom rooms, November 1/5/8/15 deadlines), named tools (LearningHub, Slack channel), and specific actions (15-minute training, 1:1 with manager) replace vague generalities. Humanity: the closing line about the kitchen table and Desk 42, the phrase 'evolution not revolution,' and the trust-forward tone ('We trust you') all give it genuine warmth without being saccharine. This reads like a real, well-crafted memo from a thoughtful leader."}

rationale: This is an exemplary internal memo. Clarity: every element of the policy is immediately understandable with no ambiguity. Simplicity: language is plain and direct throughout—no jargon inflation or corporate bloat. Brevity: nothing is wasted; every paragraph earns its place, and there's no throat-clearing intro. Structure: the bold headers and logical progression (what → why → what next) make it scannable and easy to act on. Specificity: concrete numbers (22%, 89%, 30% of office space, six Zoom rooms, November 1/5/8/15 deadlines), named tools (LearningHub, Slack channel), and specific actions (15-minute training, 1:1 with manager) replace vague generalities. Humanity: the closing line about the kitchen table and Desk 42, the phrase 'evolution not revolution,' and the trust-forward tone ('We trust you') all give it genuine warmth without being saccharine. This reads like a real, well-crafted memo from a thoughtful leader.
